vocab.meaning: sự hùng vĩ/tráng lệ của kiến trúc
vocab.example: I am often compelled to capture the architectural grandeur of historical cathedrals whenever I travel abroad.

vocab.meaning: sự suy tàn của đô thị (vẻ đẹp của những tòa nhà cũ nát/hoang phế)
vocab.example: There is a haunting beauty in urban decay, and I find photographing abandoned factories strangely evocative.

vocab.meaning: sự đối xứng về mặt hình học
vocab.example: Modern glass structures offer a perfect opportunity to play with geometrical symmetry in my compositions.

vocab.meaning: một minh chứng cho/vật chứng cho
vocab.example: Old colonial buildings are a testament to the city's complex history and serve as fascinating subjects.
I like to focus on the intricate details of a building's facade, especially those with ornate stonework.

vocab.meaning: sự đặt cạnh nhau (để tạo ra sự đối lập)
vocab.example: My favorite shots illustrate the juxtaposition of ancient temples nestled between sleek, futuristic skyscrapers.

vocab.meaning: đường chân trời/toàn cảnh thành phố
vocab.example: I often hike to high vantage points to photograph the city skylines during the golden hour.

vocab.meaning: các cấu trúc nguyên khối/đồ sộ
vocab.example: The monolithic structures of the financial district can feel quite intimidating when viewed through a wide-angle lens.

vocab.meaning: sự đùa giỡn/biến hóa của ánh sáng
vocab.example: I love how the play of light on metallic surfaces can transform a dull office block into a work of art.
I prefer taking photos of landmarks that have stood the test of time rather than temporary pop-up installations.
